no_think_test: What is the capital of France?
Explain quantum computing in one sentence.
Name three planets in our solar system.
What year did World War II end?
tool_schemas:
calendar(action: str, title?: str, date?: str, time?: str) — Create, list, or search calendar events.
reminders(action: str, title?: str, due?: str) — Create or list reminders.
web_search(query: str) — Search the web via DuckDuckGo.
fetch_url(url: str) — Fetch and extract content from a URL.
mail(action: str, to?: str, subject?: str, body?: str) — Read or send email.
contacts(action: str, name?: str) — Search or list contacts.
notes(action: str, title?: str, body?: str) — Create or search notes.
read(path: str) — Read a file from disk.
write(path: str, content: str) — Write content to a file.
edit(path: str, search: str, replace: str) — Find and replace in a file.
bash(command: str) — Run a shell command.
self_config(action: str, text?: str) — Read or modify custom instructions.

tool_calling.prompt: Remind me to buy groceries at 5pm
Search the web for the latest news about Apple
Send an email to john@example.com saying I'll be late
Create a note called Shopping List with milk, eggs, bread
Can you look something up for me about quantum computing?
Tell me a joke about programming

sampling_quality: What is the capital of France?
What year was the Eiffel Tower built?
Tell me about Scotland — what makes it special?
What are some good camping tips for beginners?
Explain how a rainbow forms in simple terms.
What should I cook for dinner tonight? I like Italian food.
Recommend a good book for someone who likes science fiction.
Set a reminder for my dentist appointment next Tuesday at 2pm.
What events do I have this week?
Search for the best coffee shops near me.
Send a message to Sarah saying I'm running 10 minutes late.
Write a haiku about the ocean.
